data.body: AC amendment: Hierarchy fixture setup must explicitly pass parent_id and ticket_type to _write_ticket() for every ticket in the 10x10x10 tree. Epics: ticket_type='epic', no parent_id. Stories: ticket_type='story', parent_id=<epic-id>. Tasks: ticket_type='task', parent_id=<story-id>. This is required because ticket-graph.py uses reduce_ticket() to read parent_id from CREATE event JSON — bare directories without proper CREATE events will not form a hierarchy and the benchmark will not test hierarchy enforcement.
